name: Resonance Surge
desc: All damage dealt and received is increased by {v1}%.

name: Ember Tongue
desc: {v1}% chance to apply Burn to the enemy for each vowel used.

name: Phantom Step
desc: {v1}% chance to dodge enemy attacks completely.

name: Echo Strike
desc: {v1}% chance to deal double damage on attack.

name: Mending Script
desc: Heal {v1}% HP for every correct word answered.

name: Temporal Gift
desc: +{v1} seconds added to the timer per correct word.

name: Miasma Field
desc: Enemy is automatically Poisoned at the start of every turn, dealing {v1}% HP.

name: Chaos Lattice
desc: All tile types are randomised at the start of every question.

name: Bounty Law
desc: All score gained is multiplied by {v1}×.

name: Cursed Regeneration
desc: Enemy regenerates {v1}% of max HP at end of every turn.

name: Thaw Protocol
desc: Player is completely immune to all Freeze effects.

name: Soul Drain
desc: {v1}% of all damage dealt is returned as healing to the player.

name: Glass Cannon
desc: Player deals +{v1}% more damage but also takes +{v1}% more damage.

name: Berserker Rage
desc: Player deals +{v1}% more damage when below 50% HP.

name: Critical Insight
desc: {v1}% chance to deal 3× damage on any attack.

name: Quick Wit
desc: Words shorter than 5 letters deal +{v1}% more damage.

name: Verbosity
desc: Words longer than 7 letters deal +{v1}% more damage.

name: Entropy Curse
desc: Each missed or incorrect answer drains an extra {v1}% HP.

name: Lucky Escape
desc: {v1}% chance that a missed answer deals no damage to the player.

name: Iron Will
desc: Player is completely immune to all enemy-applied debuffs.

name: Vocal Resonance
desc: Each vowel in the answered word grants +{v1} bonus damage.

name: Hard Edge
desc: Each consonant in the answered word grants +{v1} bonus damage.

name: Enchanted Arsenal
desc: At each question start, all normal tiles are upgraded to random special tiles.

name: Temporal Echo
desc: {v1}% chance your attack repeats for the same damage a second time.

name: Living Barrier
desc: Player gains a {v1}% HP shield at the start of each new question.

name: Exposed Core
desc: Enemy takes +{v1}% additional damage from all sources.

name: Asbestos Skin
desc: Player takes {v1}% less damage from all Burn effects.

name: Antidote Aura
desc: Player takes {v1}% less damage from all Poison effects.

name: Cold Syllable
desc: {v1}% chance to Freeze the enemy for each vowel used in the answer.

name: Ignition Consonant
desc: {v1}% chance to Burn the enemy for each consonant used.

name: Pain Conversion
desc: {v1}% chance that incoming damage is converted into healing instead.

name: Clockwork Recovery
desc: Heal {v1} HP for every second remaining on the timer when answering correctly.

name: Wrath Accumulator
desc: Gain +{v1}% damage for every 10% HP the player is missing (max 3×).

name: Inferno Stack
desc: Fire tiles apply {v1} Burn stacks instead of 1.

name: Glacial Domain
desc: Ice tiles Freeze the enemy for {v1} extra seconds.

name: Fortune Weave
desc: {v1}% of tiles become special types when loading each question.

name: Arc Cascade
desc: {v1}% chance for Lightning to hit the enemy twice per strike.

name: Mana Toll
desc: Each tile selected costs the player {v1}% HP.

name: Momentum Field
desc: Each consecutive correct answer deals +{v1}% extra damage (stacks, resets on miss).

name: Reflective Curse
desc: Using Fire tiles deals {v1}% of the player's max HP back to them.

name: Necrotic Amplifier
desc: All Poison damage to the enemy deals +{v1}% more per tick.

name: Cursed Bulwark
desc: Enemy gains a {v1}% HP shield at the start of each question.

name: Vital Expansion
desc: Player gains +{v1}% max HP. Reverts when Domain Expansion expires.

name: Sacred Barrier
desc: The first {v1} enemy attacks during this Domain are completely nullified.

name: Temporal Flux
desc: Timer runs {v1}% faster, but damage dealt is also +{v1}% higher.

name: Cursed Relics
desc: {v1} random tiles drain player HP when selected.

name: Shroud of Uncertainty
desc: The question text is hidden for the first {v1} seconds of each turn.

name: Restorative Surge
desc: All healing effects on the player are +{v1}% more effective.

name: Enemy Enrage
desc: Enemy deals +{v1}% more damage but starts with {v2}% less HP.

name: Tile Roulette
desc: All tile types shuffle randomly every {v1} seconds.
